source_milestone: R16 Operational Memory, Artifact Map, and Role-Bound Workflow Foundation

role_catalog.purpose: Operator-facing control over milestone posture, decisions, evidence summaries, boundaries, and non-claims.
Task and card coordination using milestone authority, evidence summaries, decision and routing context.
Governance, product/architecture constraints, contract/state model refs, and architecture decision context.
Bounded implementation context from task/card memory, allowed contract/tool/test refs, and current constraints.
Acceptance criteria, validator and test context, evidence refs, and invalid fixture awareness.
Proof-review packages, validation manifests, exact source refs, caveats, and non-claims.
Knowledge index, artifact classification, stale/deprecated refs, and cleanup candidate memory.
Final-head support, validation manifests, closeout eligibility, evidence paths, and non-claims.

global_forbidden_actions: generate baseline role memory packs before R16-007
implement role memory pack generator before R16-007 or later authorized task

current_posture.posture_statement: R16 active through R16-006 only; R16-007 through R16-026 remain planned only.

pack_generation_status.explicit_statement: No generated baseline role memory packs exist yet; no role memory pack generator exists yet.

non_claims: no generated baseline role memory packs
role-specific memory pack model does not equal runtime agents or runtime memory
generated baseline memory layers remain committed state artifacts, not runtime memory

model_statement: R16-006 defines the role-specific memory pack model only. It does not generate baseline role memory packs, implement a role memory pack generator, or provide runtime memory loading.
